Overview Compliance Centre Social Procurement Management Approach Testimonials Case Studies

Client References

References available for
every sector we serve.

CPC does not publish named testimonials without client approval. Verified references are available directly for formal procurement evaluation — same-sector, same-contract-scale.

CPC's reference policy is straightforward: for any contract of 12 months or more, we can provide a direct reference from a nominated contact at that client organisation. References are matched by sector. government references for government tenders, education references for education sector evaluations, and so on. Anonymous attributions below reflect the nature of feedback CPC receives; full verified references are available on request to references@cpclean.com.au.

“CPC's compliance infrastructure is genuinely different from what we've experienced with other providers. The audit documentation is always ready — we've never had to chase.”

— Facilities Manager, Queensland Government Portfolio

“The ability to produce ISO certificate copies, WHS documentation and Modern Slavery statements within hours of request is exactly what procurement requires.”

— Procurement Officer, Federal Government Agency

“We renewed the contract specifically because CPC's reporting made our own compliance obligations easier to manage.”

— Property Manager, National Education Provider

Reference Policy

How CPC Provides References

CPC provides verified references — direct contact with a named person at the client organisation — for the following:

  • ✓ Contracts of 12 months or more duration
  • ✓ Same-sector references: government references for government tenders, education references for education sector evaluations, and so on
  • ✓ References matched by contract scale — comparable headcount, site count and service complexity
  • ✓ References from the same state or territory where relevant

To arrange a reference check, email references@cpclean.com.au with the sector, approximate contract scale and your preferred timing. CPC will confirm a reference contact within 2 business days.

Contact for References

Direct reference arrangements for procurement evaluation

Email: references@cpclean.com.au
Please include the sector, contract scale and required timing. We confirm a reference contact within 2 business days.

Verified Outcomes

Case Studies

For documented, verifiable outcomes from specific contracts — including government portfolio management, industrial site cleaning, education sector delivery and the carbon neutral program — CPC's case studies provide the detail that reference checks cannot convey at scale.

View Case Studies →

For New Clients

Get a Cleaning Proposal

Tell us about your sector and sites. We'll design a compliance-driven cleaning program around your obligations and schedule.

  • ✓ Site assessment included
  • ✓ Sector-specific proposal
  • ✓ Response within 5 business days

For Procurement Teams

Due Diligence Hub

All compliance credentials in one place for formal procurement evaluation. No request required.

  • ✓ ISO 9001 / 14001 / 45001 certificates
  • ✓ Modern slavery statement
  • ✓ Social procurement documentation
  • ✓ Insurance and WHS documentation
Access Due Diligence Hub →
